audio_analysis.song_description: An upbeat electro-pop track featuring deadpan female vocals delivering assertive, repetitive lyrics over a tight beat.
audio_analysis.video_idea: A stylish woman in a monochrome outfit dances robotically in an underground concrete bunker. Flashing neon lights emphasize the pulsing rhythm as she confidently stares down the camera, backed by synchronized dancers.
